params.name: Soma Drink
params.description:
On Jan 25, 334 AD, Soma successfully brewed a batch of divine wine, granting the gods immortality.
As the god of wine in Indian mythology, Soma is renowned for creating a divine drink from rare herbs that grants immortality and even supernatural powers to those who drink it. As a result, it has been coveted by many mythical creatures and has sparked conflicts between gods and demons.
